---
ID: US-OLV-079
Title: Manage device inventory
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-17
Milestone: Add auth, permissions, admin, and HR migration

As a IT or HR operator
I want to track company devices
So that equipment ownership and condition remain visible

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] HrInventory renders device records.
- [ ] Users can add or edit device details.
- [ ] Deleting a device removes associated active assignments where the flow requires it.
- [ ] Pending edit ids from flows open the target device for editing.

Notes: Device deletion has both component and guided-flow variants.
---
